name: German Cabbage Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, sugar, onion flakes, and celery seed thoroughly in a large bowl.
2. Add the grated cabbage to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, and melted butter until well mixed.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir quickly for no more than 10 seconds.
5. Grease a muffin pan and spoon the batter into each cup.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes, or until the muffins are fully cooked.
Serves: 12
